info.title: Smart Sawda API
info.description:
**[Changelog & implementation checklist](/api/docs/changelog/)** — see what to build and track progress per endpoint.

---

## Quick Start

### 1. Get a token
```
POST /api/v2/token/
{"phone_number": "+998901234567", "password": "secret"}
→ {"access": "eyJ...", "refresh": "eyJ..."}
```

### 2. Use the token
```
Authorization: Bearer eyJ...
```

### 3. Refresh when expired
```
POST /api/v2/token/refresh/
{"refresh": "eyJ..."}
→ {"access": "eyJ..."}
```

---

### Pagination
All list endpoints return:
```json
{"count": 100, "next": "?page=2", "previous": null, "results": [...]}
```

### Filtering
Use query parameters: `?store=1&date_from=2026-01-01&is_paid=false`

### Errors
| Code | Meaning |
|------|----------|
| 400 | Validation error — check response body for field details |
| 401 | Token missing or expired |
| 403 | No permission |
| 404 | Not found |

### Currency & Amounts
All amounts are stored in the document's currency with an exchange rate.
To convert to base currency: `amount * rate`.

get.description:
GET /api/v2/config/frontend-config/

Single bootstrap call. Returns everything the frontend needs to render
the app shell + sidebar:

- tenant: id, name, business_type, base_currency_code, subscription_status
- feature_flags: which capabilities are on for this tenant
- is_admin: whether the current user has admin privileges
- menu: which sidebar entries the current user can see

Lookup data (currencies, payment methods, categories, writeoff reasons,
expense categories, etc.) is NOT bundled here — fetch it from its own
CRUD endpoint when the screen needs it.

post.description:
Send `phone_number` + `password` to get JWT tokens.

**Response** includes `access` (short-lived) and `refresh` (long-lived) tokens, plus a `context` object with user info, store, and feature flags.

**To authorize:** click the **Authorize** button above and paste the `access` token.

Takes a refresh type JSON web token and returns an access type JSON web
token if the refresh token is valid.

PatchedProductWriteRequest.description:
Create or update a product.

Which fields to show depends on feature flags from `GET /api/v2/config/frontend-config/`.

**Always required:** `name`, `category`, `base_unit`, `selling_price`, `min_price`, `barcode`, `ikpu`

**Conditional fields (show only when flag is true):**

| Flag | Fields to show | Notes |
|------|---------------|-------|
| `has_variants` | `has_variations`, `variants[]` | Each variant: `{option_values[], sku, barcode, selling_price, min_price}`. If false, send `has_variations=false` |
| `has_expiry` | `track_expiry`, `default_shelf_life_days` | On stock entry: `expiry_date` per lot |
| `has_serial` | `track_serial_numbers` | On stock entry: serial numbers per lot |
| `has_imei` | `track_serial_numbers` | Same as serial, but label it "IMEI" in the UI |
| `has_weight` | `tare_weight`, `plu_code` | Set `base_unit` to kg/g. Use `flexible_units` for conversions |
| `flexible_units` | `unit_conversions[]` | Each: `{from_unit, to_unit, factor}`. POS shows multiple selling units |
| `has_articles` | `sku` | Show SKU field prominently as "Article number" |
| `has_recycling` | (on Category) `is_recyclable`, `recyclable_to` | Not a product field |

sku.description: Optional. Stock keeping unit / article number

base_unit.description: Primary unit of measure ID (e.g. piece, kg)

selling_price.description: Optional. Default retail price per base unit

plu_code.description: Optional. Price look-up code for scales

low_stock_threshold.description: Optional. Alert when stock drops below this quantity

variants.description: Optional. List of variant objects when has_variations=true

unit_conversions.description: Optional. Unit conversion rules for flexible units

initial_stock.description: Optional. Create initial stock entry on product creation

style.description: JSON object with receipt styling config

is_active.description: Whether this template is in use

comment.description: Reason or note for the revaluation

is_main.description: True if this is the primary/headquarters store

is_base.description: Whether this is the tenant's base currency. Only one allowed

is_active.description: Set false to hide without deleting

name.title: Имя
name.description: Full name of the staff member

is_mobile_user.title: Мобильный пользователь
is_mobile_user.description: True if user can log in via mobile app

is_active.title: Активный
is_active.description: Whether this user account is active

fixed_salary.title: Фикс. зарплата
fixed_salary.description: Monthly fixed salary in base currency

is_active.description: Whether this vehicle is in service

code.description: Optional. Auto-generated from name if blank

is_foreign_currency.description: Read-only. True if the linked currency is not the base currency

icon.description: Optional. Icon identifier for the frontend

PaymentMethodInline.description: Minimal payment method: id + name + currency for read-only nesting.

code.description: Optional. Auto-generated from name if blank

currency_id.description: Currency ID this payment method operates in

icon.description: Optional. Icon identifier for the frontend

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Login with phone + password, get JWT tokens

tags.name: Stores
tags.description: Manage your stores/locations

tags.name: Currencies
tags.description: Configure currencies (UZS, USD, etc.)

tags.name: Exchange Rates
tags.description: Set daily exchange rates between currencies

tags.name: Payment Methods
tags.description: Cash, card, transfer — configure accepted payment types

tags.name: Roles
tags.description: Create roles with permissions (admin, cashier, warehouse)

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Staff accounts — cashiers, managers, warehouse workers

tags.name: Client Types
tags.description: Customer categories (retail, wholesale, VIP)

tags.name: Writeoff Reasons
tags.description: Predefined reasons for stock write-offs (expired, damaged, etc.)

tags.name: Expense Categories
tags.description: Predefined categories for expenses (rent, transport, etc.)

tags.name: Cash Registers
tags.description: Physical cash register devices per store

tags.name: Receipt Templates
tags.description: Customize receipt layout and content

tags.name: Frontend Config
tags.description: Get tenant config, feature flags, and menu permissions

tags.name: Categories
tags.description: Organize products into categories and subcategories

tags.name: Units of Measure
tags.description: Units like kg, pcs, liters, meters

tags.name: Products
tags.description: Create, search, import/export products. Supports variants, barcodes, and prices per store/unit

tags.name: Product Barcodes
tags.description: Additional barcodes for a product (one product can have multiple barcodes)

tags.name: Product Prices
tags.description: Override prices per store, per unit, or per variant

tags.name: Variations
tags.description: Variation options (Size, Color) and their values (S, M, L / Red, Blue)

tags.name: Label Sizes
tags.description: Barcode label dimensions for printing

tags.name: Suppliers
tags.description: Manage suppliers and their contact info

tags.name: Supplier Balance
tags.description: Track prepaid supplier balances and payment history

tags.name: Stock Entries
tags.description: Receive goods from suppliers. Each entry has line items with quantities and costs

tags.name: Stock Balances
tags.description: View current stock levels per product, store, and batch

tags.name: Stock Payments
tags.description: Record payments against stock entry debts (partial or full)

tags.name: Stock Returns
tags.description: Return defective/excess goods to suppliers

tags.name: Recycling
tags.description: Transform raw materials into finished products (e.g. timber to planks)

tags.name: Customers
tags.description: Manage customers, their balances, and credit limits

tags.name: Customer Balance
tags.description: Top up, withdraw, and view customer prepaid balance history

tags.name: Debts
tags.description: Customer debts from credit sales. Track total, remainder, and payments

tags.name: Debt Payments
tags.description: Record payments against customer debts

tags.name: Shifts
tags.description: Open/close cashier shifts. Tracks all money movement during a shift

tags.name: Sales
tags.description: Create sales with items and payments. Supports cash, card, credit, and customer balance

tags.name: Sale Payments
tags.description: Individual payment records within a sale

tags.name: Refunds
tags.description: Process full or partial refunds on completed sales

tags.name: Charge Types
tags.description: Extra charges that can be added to sales (delivery, packaging)

tags.name: Transfers
tags.description: Move stock between stores

tags.name: Write-offs
tags.description: Remove stock from inventory (damaged, expired, lost)

tags.name: Expenses
tags.description: Record business expenses (rent, utilities, supplies)

tags.name: Cash Inflows
tags.description: Record cash deposits into the register (e.g. starting cash)

tags.name: Incomes
tags.description: Income records generated from sales and debt payments

tags.name: Revaluations
tags.description: Adjust cost prices of existing stock

tags.name: Sponsors & Loans
tags.description: Track investor money and loan repayments

tags.name: Drivers & Vehicles
tags.description: Delivery fleet management

tags.name: Staff Penalties
tags.description: Record fines and deductions from staff salary

tags.name: Staff Payouts
tags.description: Monthly salary payouts with breakdown (base + bonus - penalties)

tags.name: Reports
tags.description: Sales, profit, stock, debt, and staff reports

tags.name: Activity Log
tags.description: Audit trail — who did what and when
